title: Rust has two divergent internal SCHC APIs (headers.rs/context.rs unused parallel profile API)
description: Production Rust code (lichen-node node.rs:15, stack.rs:24, lichen-gateway gateway.rs:9) uses codec::compress/decompress (hardcoded dispatch, MQTT-SN rule 7, no OSCORE). headers.rs/context.rs (added by 1dbe31a7ed) are a parallel profile API only re-exported (lib.rs:24-28) and UNUSED - its DEFAULT_PROFILES lacks OSCORE while rules.rs declares rules 0-7 with EMPTY field slices (rules.rs:59-96); headers.rs does no OSCORE detection and its compress side is never exercised. Two APIs that disagree about the rule set is a maintenance trap: a contributor fixing 'SCHC' may edit the dead one. Fix: delete the unused API (per No Dead Code rule) or make codec.rs delegate to it after completing it (incl. OSCORE profiles per mmgu.4).
